heading: Common Triggers
body:
The query targeting alert typically occurs when there is no index to
support a query or queries or when an existing index only partially
supports a query or queries.

The [change streams](manual/changeStreams) cursors that the MongoDB Search
process (`mongot`) uses to keep MongoDB Search indexes updated can
contribute to the query targeting ratio and trigger
[query targeting alerts](query-targeting-alerts) if the ratio
is high.
